data.title: Hick’s Law Application
data.description: Simplifying user interface to reduce decision-making time, ensuring fast navigation.

data.title: Consistency Principle
data.description: Maintaining a consistent interface to create a predictable and reassuring user experience.

data.title: Fitts’ Law
data.description: Design optimized for quick clicks and actions through appropriately sized buttons and interactive elements.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Ensuring the platform is effectively usable on various devices and screen sizes.

data.title: Feedback Loop
data.description: Immediate feedback is provided after user interactions to enhance engagement and user satisfaction.
